vocab.example: The high-tech campus today is a far cry from the modest, crumbling buildings I attended as a child.

vocab.meaning: chạy theo xu hướng đang thịnh hành
vocab.once: My school has recently climbed on the green bandwagon by installing solar panels and banning single-use plastics.

vocab.example: While technology evolved rapidly, the renovation of our old library seemed to progress at a snail's pace.

vocab.meaning: giao thoa giữa hai ưu điểm (cũ và mới)
vocab.example: By keeping the historic architecture but upgrading the interiors, the school now offers the best of both worlds.

vocab.meaning: bắt kịp với, theo kịp với
vocab.example: The curriculum has been revamped to keep pace with the demands of the modern digital economy.

vocab.meaning: thổi luồng sinh khí mới vào (làm mới thứ gì đó)
vocab.example: The new headmaster has really breathed new life into the school’s arts program, which used to be quite dull.

vocab.meaning: đi trước thời đại, tiên phong
vocab.example: In terms of vocational training, my old school is definitely ahead of the curve compared to other local institutions.

vocab.meaning: góc nhìn (từ một vị trí hoặc thời điểm nhất định)
vocab.example: From my current vantage point as an adult, I can see that the school has become much more inclusive than it once was.

vocab.meaning: toàn diện, trên mọi phương diện
vocab.example: The improvements in facilities haven't just been in sports; we've seen upgrades across the board, from labs to cafeterias.

vocab.meaning: bước sang một trang mới (thường là tích cực hơn)
vocab.example: With the recent influx of funding, the school has turned over a new leaf and is now ranked among the top in the city.
